results.title: Bugatti unveils final Hypercar with W16 engine as it move V16 era
results.description: Bugatti has revealed the final Mistral to feature the legendary quad-turbocharged 8.0-litre W16 engine. It is the 99th and last example of a powertrain that has featured in Veyron, Chiron and the track-only Bolide.

results.title: OnePlus Announced A New Phone The Same Week It Pulled Out Of The US And Europe
results.description: As OnePlus leaves the U.S. and Europe behind, it already has a new phone on the way elsewhere. The timing makes the company's priorities painfully clear.
